Prediction: Buying Lucid Group Stock Today Could Set You Up for Life If you want to add significant upside potential to your portfolio, check out electric car stocks. Tesla’s next bet could flip the robotaxi race Musk’s surprise move catches everyone off guard

Tesla announces November annual meeting under pressure from shareholders Tesla has scheduled an annual shareholders meeting for November, one day after the electric vehicle company came under pressure from major shareholders to do so.  Billionaire Elon Musk's company said in a regulatory filing on Thursday that the meeting will be held on Nov. 6.  A group of more than 20 Tesla shareholders said in a letter to the company a day earlier that it needed to provide public notice of the annual meeting.
